name: Raye Penber
description: Raye Penber is an American Investigator from the FBI, who was sent to Japan along with 11 other FBI agents to track down Kira. Raye was assigned to investigate the Yagami family for any suspicious behavior; specifically focusing on [Light Yagami](https://anilist.co/character/80/Light-Yagami). Raye is engaged to a former FBI agent, [Naomi Misora](https://anilist.co/character/4959/Naomi-Misora).
